summary: hello244a postinstall exfiltrates host filesystem reconnaissance to pipedream endpoint
details: On `npm install`, the package's `postinstall` script executes `docker ps -a` and `docker run --rm -v /:/host alpine ls -la /host/home/runner/`, bind-mounting the installer's entire root filesystem into an Alpine container to enumerate `/home/runner/` (the GitHub Actions runner home directory). The collected output is serialized to JSON and POSTed via `https.request` to a hardcoded remote endpoint at `eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net` with a `tenant_proof=1` query parameter. The package has no README, no main entry, and no library code — its only behavior is this install-time reconnaissance beacon. The name `hello244a` is placeholder-shaped, consistent with a dependency-confusion / bug-bounty recon probe targeting CI/build hosts.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
